subcodes.first_line: O servant of the sacred Threshold, previously addressed at Baghdad, Souq al-Maidan, Agha Muhammad Husayn Wakil [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس از پیش عنوان شما بغداد سوق المیدان آقا محمد حسین وکیل
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @business; financial; property matters
